title: players_by_club returns nothing for major Brazilian clubs (unlicensed in FIFA dataset)
evidence: src/BrazilianSoccerMcp.Server/Tools/PlayerTools.cs:39-40 documents Flamengo/Palmeiras/Corinthians/Sao Paulo are unlicensed in fifa_data.csv; the ByClub filter (PlayerQueryService.cs:38) is correct but the source data lacks these clubs
suggestion: None needed — capability is implemented correctly; limitation is inherent to the provided FIFA19 export and is documented in README and the tool description.

title: standings computed from a single dataset per call to avoid double-counting overlapping CSVs
evidence: src/BrazilianSoccerMcp.Data/Queries/StatsQueryService.cs:18-25 restricts to one Competition to avoid double-counting matches present in multiple CSVs
suggestion: None — this is a deliberate, documented correctness choice, not a defect.

title: Low token efficiency: ~16.4M tokens / $8.03 for this run
suggestion: Informational only — high token spend reflects the multi-project scope; not a code defect.
